hero.bio: Final-year engineering student at EPITA Paris. I build robust systems, from code to deployment — with a particular passion for finance.

about.heading: ABOUT
about.bio: Final-year engineering student at EPITA Paris. I build robust systems, from code to deployment — with a particular passion for finance.
about.paragraph2: Fascinated by the complexity of systems — whether data pipelines, microservice architectures or financial markets. I look for projects where technical rigor meets real impact.

tiger-compiler.description: Full compiler for the educational Tiger language — lexical, syntactic and semantic analysis plus code generation.

jws-epibazaar.description: Backend for a resource-management game — 3 interconnected apps with a layered architecture, Kafka messaging and the Hibernate ORM.

42sh.description: Full POSIX shell with AST parsing, command execution, redirections and pipes. Built by a team of 4 in one month.

ocr-sudoku.description: Sudoku grid recognition via image processing and a neural network, followed by automatic solving.

prospectmap.description: Automated prospecting tool that identifies local businesses likely to need a new website.

dunes-demis.description: Showcase site for the Dunes & Demis crew at the 4L Trophy 2027. A modern, fast interface.

contact.intro: Open to internships, apprenticeships and ambitious projects. Feel free to reach out.

metadata.title: Thibaut Bonefont — Fullstack Engineer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Thibaut Bonefont, Fullstack & DevOps engineer, student at EPITA Paris. Focused on distributed systems and finance.
